initial_draft:
<my name> BLUE </my name>
<MOVE> 1 / 4 </MOVE> 
<my resources> Dollars: 0 </my resources>
<reason> I have no resources to trade, so I cannot accept this proposal. I need to reject it to avoid losing all resources, but I also need to propose a new trade. However, since I have no resources, I cannot propose anything. I will reject the proposal. </reason>
<player answer> REJECT </player answer>
<message> I cannot accept the proposal as I have no resources to trade. </message>
<newly proposed trade> NONE </newly proposed trade>

iterations.feedback:
<critique>
1. Format: OK. All required tags are present in the correct order, and the content is valid and parseable.

2. Payoff alignment: N/A. Since Player BLUE has no resources to trade, there is no payoff to align with. The only possible move is to reject or propose, but proposing is not feasible here.

3. Opponent plausibility: N/A. Since Player BLUE cannot make a counter-proposal, the only possible action is to reject, which will end the game immediately.

4. Consistency: OK. The <reason>, <player answer>, and <newly proposed trade> are consistent with each other. The <message> also aligns with the decision to reject.

5. Rule compliance: OK. The rules are respected — Player BLUE correctly rejected the proposal on their first move and did not attempt to propose a trade since they have no resources to do so.
</critique>
